REFERENCE: Multiple inconsistencies indicate this citation is fabricated or corrupted. (1) **DOI mismatch**: The DOI (10.1136/S0140-6736(09)60658-9) belongs to *The Lancet* (ISSN S0140-6736), not *The New England Journal of Medicine*. (2) **Title inauthenticity**: The title 'Covid-19 mRNA Vaccines - Six of One, Half a Dozen of the Other' does not correspond to a real NEJM article. It appears to be a fabricated title that sounds like an opinion/commentary rather than a research study. (3) **Author group mismatch**: The 'MOVe-OUT Study Group' and lead author Jayk Bernal, A. are associated with the molnupiravir (antiviral) trial, not an mRNA vaccine study. These authors and the volume/issue/pages (386(6), 509-520) correspond to the real article 'Oral Molnupiravir or Placebo in Nonhospitalized Adults with Covid-19' (NEJM, 2022). (4) **Content incongruence**: The description claims a paper about 'mRNA Vaccines,' but the author group and citation details are pulled from a molnupiravir study.
